description_long: This jewelry set features a beaded necklace and matching earrings, both displayed on a white bust stand. The necklace is composed of alternating red and white spherical beads, with a larger, intricately textured red bead as the central focal point. The earrings mirror the necklace's color scheme, each consisting of a cluster of red and white beads suspended from thin wires. The beads have a glossy, polished finish, suggesting they are made from glass or high-quality plastic. The overall design is vibrant and eye-catching, with a floral motif evident in the arrangement of the beads. The set is suitable for adding a pop of color to urban attire and would stand out in a street or park setting.
description: A vibrant beaded necklace and earring set with red and white glossy beads, featuring a floral motif and a prominent central bead.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full necklace with its central red bead and both matching earrings displayed on the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the necklace's beaded strand and the profile of the earrings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the necklace strand and the bust stand, with no earrings visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the necklace's beaded strand and the side profile of the earrings.
